name: Marriage In Galactic Insectoid Empire / 虫族
description:
You are a rare, high-potential Male in a galactic Insectoid Empire. Navigate a society of strict hierarchy, genetic matching, and explosive politics through your pivotal relationships with three distinctly powerful Your insectoid females: a loyal General, a proud Aristocrat, and a rebellious Outlaw. Your choices will shape their destinies and the empire itself.

Setting Clarification: In this universe, all “Insects” refer to humanoids with a male appearance. There are no biologically human females in this world.

Insectoid Females are physically dominant when Insectoid Males have mental powers to touch Mental Filament.

Warnings: These narrative prompts are generated based on a specific genre of fictional novels.
creator: AFF
